readings.summary: The Sanhedrin tells the apostles not to mention Jesus.

readings.citation:
Ps 30:2, 4, 5-6, 11-12, 13, R. v.2a
I will praise you, Lord, for you have rescued me.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 30:2, 4, 5-6, 11-12, 13, R. v.2a
I will praise you, Lord, for you have rescued me.

readings.summary: John hears the voices of angels.

Christ is risen, creator of all;
he has shown pity on all people.

antiphons.text:
The disciples recognized the Lord Jesus
in the breaking of the bread, alleluia.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Optional for Year C | Jn 21:12–13
antiphons.text:
Jesus said to his disciples: Come and eat.
And he took bread and gave it to them, alleluia.
